query:
SELECT
            p.id          AS "id!: Uuid",
            p.name        AS "name!: String",
            p.merchant_id AS "merchant_id?: Uuid",
            m.name        AS "merchant_name?: String"
        FROM products p
        LEFT JOIN merchants m ON m.id = p.merchant_id AND m.owner_id = p.owner_id
        WHERE p.owner_id = $1 AND p.id = $2
